summary: Added a standalone HTML implementation and cleanup plan for keeping this repo as the local MCP VCR engine, preparing server-shaped storage and SDK surfaces, and keeping curated fixture packs in a separate future repo.

agentTurn.user_prompt: ok, according to ur plan, what we should do to this repo, i want a very detailed implementation/cleanup plan, write into a .html
agentTurn.assistant_summary: Added docs/local-to-server-engine-plan.html with the local-engine to server-ready roadmap. The plan keeps datalox-agent-replay as the engine repo, puts curated fixture packs in a separate future repo, defines immediate cleanup, and lays out phases for verified replay quickstart, BYO MCP config UX, SDK entrypoints, server-shaped stores, refs/metrics/GC, fixture pack contracts, local daemon, server registry client, and parallel tool interaction support. Linked the new HTML plan from docs/project-overview.md and cleaned regenerated legacy pack surfaces from the local repo before verification.
